description: Show your OTHCloud Terminal activity in Discord via Rich Presence.
config.enabled: Show OTHCloud Terminal activity in Discord.
config.applicationName: Name shown next to the activity in Discord. Falls back to the Discord application name if blank.
config.detailsTemplate: First line of the activity. Placeholders: {file} {language} {workspace} {app} {idle}. Default: "Editing {file}".
config.stateTemplate: Second line of the activity. Same placeholders as detailsTemplate. Default: "Workspace: {workspace} • {language}".
config.idleDetailsTemplate: First line of the activity when no editor is focused. Placeholders: {app} {idle}. Default: "{app} — {idle}".
config.largeImage: Large image asset key. Upload an image under your Discord application's Rich Presence Assets and reference it by name.
config.largeImageText: Tooltip text shown when hovering the large image.
config.smallImage: Optional small image asset key. Leave blank to hide.
config.smallImageText: Tooltip text shown when hovering the small image.
config.showFileName: Include the active file name in the presence details.
config.showWorkspace: Include the workspace name in the presence state line.
